summary: 28/28 tests pass on host. Implementation is a faithful subtract-only subset of real vLLM v1 IPC boundary; key behaviors verified against real source at pin f3fef123. lint_fidelity has no BLOCKING.

run_environment.reason: 精简版纯单元/集成测试，不 import vllm、不需 CUDA（依赖 msgspec/numpy/torch/pyzmq 均 host 可用）。按 tester 契约：不 import vllm -> host 跑。
run_environment.note: 本章测试通过同进程 daemon 线程承载 EngineCoreProc + 真实跨 ZMQ context (tcp://127.0.0.1 临时端口) 通信，无需 fork 子进程或 CUDA。

test_results.warning_detail: torch.frombuffer non-writable buffer UserWarning (无害，真实 vLLM 零拷贝解码同样行为)

test_files.test_byte_tag_protocol.py: 9 tests — EngineCoreRequestType 单字节 hex 标签 round-trip / make_client 三层选型 (asyncio 非 mp -> NotImplementedError) / _handle_client_request 字节标签分派 ADD/ABORT/UTILITY(成功+失败)/WAKEUP(no-op)/EXECUTOR_FAILED(raise)
test_files.test_serial_zerocopy.py: 9 tests — 小张量/数组内联单帧 / 大张量大数组进 aux_buffers 多帧零拷贝还原 / encode_into 复用 bytearray 作 bufs[0] / OOB consumer 旁路大张量(主帧仍单帧) / OOB dict 无 provider 断言失败 / UtilityResult round-trip
test_files.test_tensor_ipc.py: 5 tests — sender 返回元数据并入队 / new_message 推进 message_id 归零 tensor_id / receiver round-trip / drain-and-buffer 乱序到达重组
test_files.test_ipc_integration.py: 5 tests — ready 握手与 rank0 2字节LE identity / Sync ADD 经 ROUTER->DEALER 抵 engine input_queue / ABORT 双队列急停 / call_utility(_async) call_id+Future RPC 配对 / 失败抛异常 / 大张量 ADD 触发 track=True pending_messages / AsyncMPClient 全闭环 / validate_alive 见 ENGINE_CORE_DEAD 抛 EngineDeadError

behavioral_alignment_checks: EngineCoreRequestType 6 个字节标签值 (ADD=b'\x00' .. WAKEUP=b'\x05') == 真实 __init__.py:L243-L250
socket 拓扑 ROUTER(client input bind)/DEALER(engine input connect identity)/PUSH(engine output)/PULL(client output) == 真实 core_client.py:L514,L519 + core.py:L1000,L1391,L1485
engine identity = engine_index.to_bytes(length=2, byteorder='little') == 真实 core.py:L832
ENGINE_CORE_DEAD = b'ENGINE_CORE_DEAD' + linger=4000 == 真实 core.py:L809,L1485
_send_input msg=(core_engine, request_type.value, *encoded) + len(msg)<=3 快路径 / 否则 track=True == 真实 core_client.py:L802-L809
_encode_tensor 三分支 inline(<256B & is_cpu) / OOB consumer dict / aux_buffers index == 真实 serial_utils.py:L257-L273 逐行一致
TensorIpcReceiver drain-and-buffer 乱序重组 + 过期张量丢弃 == 真实 tensor_ipc.py:L124-L179 控制流 1:1

_handle_client_request 字节标签分派 (WAKEUP no-op / ADD / ABORT / UTILITY 反射+UtilityOutput / EXECUTOR_FAILED raise RuntimeError) == 真实 core.py:L1266-L1300 (仅删 _reject_*_in_shutdown 排空分支, dossier delete 第4项批准)

subtraction_audit.must_keep_symbols: 34 个 must_keep 符号全部保留 (lint_fidelity 校验)
deviations_documented: 进程->线程: MPClient 用同进程 daemon 线程承载 EngineCoreProc (ZMQ 仍真实跨 context 通信), impl-notes 已注明
torch.mp.Queue->queue.Queue (TensorIpc 单进程 put/get 语义一致), impl-notes 已注明
EngineCore.step 不接 scheduler/executor (scope_note + 铁律禁伪 forward, 保留无请求空返回短路), impl-notes 已注明
